etymology.description: Possibly depicts corridors and a room -> original form of 廊(廊) (láng, "corridor")
etymology.interpretation: It likely depicts a layout resembling rooms and corridors, indicating an enclosed, well-ordered space, which reflects the notion of 'good' through the idea of structure and order.

examples.chinese: 他的品行一向很好(他的品行一向很好)。
examples.pinyin: Tā de pǐnxíng yīxiàng hěn hǎo.
examples.english: His conduct has always been good.

examples.chinese: 天气良好(天氣良好)，适合出游(適合出遊)。
examples.english: The weather is good, suitable for an outing.

examples.chinese: 保持良好的习惯(保持良好的習慣)，能带来健康(能帶來健康)。
examples.pinyin: Bǎochí liánghǎo de xíguàn, néng dàilái jiànkāng.
examples.english: Maintaining good habits can bring health.
